title: Tangy Smoky Ethiopian Smoked Mackerel Dulet
description: A citrusy and flaky Ethiopian dish featuring smoked mackerel, this dulet is a nostalgic and flavorful meal, with a low fat content making it friendly to various diets.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the flaked smoked mackerel and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is heated through.
Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the torn injera bread and cook until it is well combined with the mackerel mixture.
Serve the dulet hot, garnished with additional lemon wedges if desired.
